completed_games.title: It Takes Two
completed_games.notes: Tight pacing and varied level design made every session feel fresh.
completed_games.favorite_memory: The co-op chaos in the Clockwork chapter when both of us finally synced the puzzle timing.

to_play_games.title: Helldivers 2
to_play_games.reason_to_play: Strong squad co-op loop, tactical chaos, and a good long-term session game for weekly nights.
